briefdescription.para: This Send handler is called asynchronously from an interrupt context and indicates that data in the specified buffer has been sent.

parameterdescription.para: is not used, but contains a pointer to the IIC device driver instance which the handler is being called for.

briefdescription.para: This function configures Frame Buffer for defined mode.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if init is OK else XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This Receive handler is called asynchronously from an interrupt context and indicates that data in the specified buffer has been Received.

parameterdescription.para: is not used, but contains a pointer to the IIC device driver instance which the handler is being called for.

briefdescription.para: This Status handler is called asynchronously from an interrupt context and indicates the events that have occurred.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the IIC driver instance for which the handler is being called for.
indicates the condition that has occurred.

briefdescription.para: This function writes a buffer of data to the IIC serial sensor.

parameterdescription.para: is the number of bytes in the buffer to be written.

briefdescription.para: This function reads data from the IIC serial Camera Sensor into a specified buffer.

parameterdescription.para: contains the address of the data buffer to be filled.
contains the number of bytes in the buffer to be read.

briefdescription.para: This function setup Camera sensor programming wrt resolution selected.
This function initializes IIC controller and gets config parameters.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes, reads, and verifies the data to the IIC EEPROM.

briefdescription.para: This function sets send, receive and error handlers for IIC interrupts.
This function programs colour space converter with the given width and height.

parameterdescription.para: is Hsize of a packet in pixels.
is number of lines of a packet.

briefdescription.para: This function programs colour space converter with the given width and height.

parameterdescription.para: is Hsize of a packet in pixels.
is number of lines of a packet.

briefdescription.para: This function programs colour space converter with the given width and height.

parameterdescription.para: is Hsize of a packet in pixels.
is number of lines of a packet.

briefdescription.para: This function is called when a Frame Buffer Write Done has occurred.
This function is called when a Frame Buffer Read Done has occurred.
This function disables Demosaic, GammaLut and VProcSS IPs.
This function calculates the stride.
Main function to initialize the video pipeline and process user input.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if MIPI example was successful else XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This function Initializes Image Processing blocks wrt to selected resolution.
This function enables MIPI CSI IP.
This function disables MIPI CSI IP.
This function starts camera sensor to transmit captured video.
This function initializes and configures VProcSS IP for scalar mode with the given input and output width and height values.

parameterdescription.para: is a flag value to initialize IP only once.

briefdescription.para: This function resets VProcSS_scalar IP.
This function enables MIPI DSI SS.
This function disables MIPI DSI SS.
This function programs MIPI DSI SS with the required timing parameters.
This function initializes MIPI DSI SS and gets config parameters.

detaileddescription.para: This function programs MIPI DSI SS with the required timing parameters.

briefdescription.para: This function programs GPIO to 1 to select MIPI DSI SS Stream Path in AXI- Stream switch.
This function programs GPIO to '0' to select HDMI Stream path in AXI-Stream switch.
This function stops VProc_SS scalar IP.
This function initializes GPIO IP for Stream Switch selection and gets config parameters.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful or else XST_FAILURE.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes MIPI CSI2 RX SS and gets config parameters.

detaileddescription.para: This function programs MIPI CSI SS with the required timing parameters.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful or else XST_FAILURE.

briefdescription.para: This function returns selected colour depth of MIPI CSI2 RX SS.
This function sets colour depth value getting from MIPI CSI2 RX SS.
This function prints the video pipeline information.
This file contains the video pipe line configuration, Sensor configuration and its programming as per the resolution selected by user.

detaileddescription.para: Please see pipeline_program.h for more details.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 pg 12/07/17 Initial release.
